name: wd-k01-v9-0-2
description: OctoBus package for WD K01 threat-intelligence joint-defense system V9.0.2: attack-monitor log query, IP blacklist/whitelist query, and private (attack) threat-intel add/delete/query.

WD_K01_V9_0_2.WD_K01_V9_0_2/QueryIPList.name: query-ip-list
WD_K01_V9_0_2.WD_K01_V9_0_2/QueryIPList.description: Query WD K01 IP blacklist/whitelist entries.

WD_K01_V9_0_2.WD_K01_V9_0_2/QueryThreatI.name: query-threat-intel
WD_K01_V9_0_2.WD_K01_V9_0_2/QueryThreatI.description: Query WD K01 private (attack) threat intelligence.

WD_K01_V9_0_2.WD_K01_V9_0_2/AddThreatInt.name: add-threat-intel
WD_K01_V9_0_2.WD_K01_V9_0_2/AddThreatInt.description: Add a WD K01 private (attack) threat-intel IP.

WD_K01_V9_0_2.WD_K01_V9_0_2/DeleteThreat.name: delete-threat-intel
WD_K01_V9_0_2.WD_K01_V9_0_2/DeleteThreat.description: Delete a WD K01 private (attack) threat-intel entry by id.
